description_long: This greenhouse features a modern, modular design with two main sections connected by a central walkway. The structure is elevated on sturdy metal legs, providing ample clearance beneath. The walls and roof are composed of horizontal wooden slats, creating a semi-open enclosure that allows for ventilation and filtered sunlight. Inside, rows of green plants are visible, suggesting active cultivation. The central section appears to house planting beds and possibly storage or utility compartments. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, with a focus on functionality and integration into urban environments.
description: A modern, elevated greenhouse with wooden slat walls and roof, featuring visible plant beds and a modular, open design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the two main greenhouse sections, central walkway, and visible rows of green plants inside.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the staggered, slatted roof structure and the depth of the greenhouse sections.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open slat design of the roof and walls, with a clear view of the plant beds inside.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the layered, modular construction and the supporting metal legs.
